items.name: ShellStatusBar
items.doc: Bottom status bar for the desktop shell with optional progress indicator.

items.name: status-text
items.doc: Primary status message shown on the left.

items.name: progress
items.doc: Progress value in the range `0.0..=1.0`; negative hides the indicator.

items.name: right-text
items.doc: Optional secondary message aligned to the right.
